_doc: Source of truth for Claude Atlas scope registry. Edited by hand. Read by ~/.claude/bin/atlas-sync. See ~/.claude/ARCHITECTURE.md for full context.

labor-city._note: slug uses hyphen; directory name has a dot. Switch to 'labor.city' if Claude Code accepts dots in command filenames.

gravity-design-system._note: Shared team repo (Arco/Isaac). Atlas is read-only here: symlinks created in ~/.claude/commands/, but no in-repo edits without team PR.

isaac._note: Cluster of team repos (backoffice, rf-monorepo, communication-api, payment-api, sorting-hat, backoffice-bff). Read-only. Sub-repos have their own .claude/ but Atlas does NOT recurse into them via this scope — and never modifies files there. See ARCHITECTURE.md §10 (SHARED-DEBT).
